response.justification: Candidate is a web/full-stack engineer (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) with no demonstrated experience in embedded firmware, LAN-switch products, network security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal), or Linux kernel modification. C experience is limited to a brief stint at National Instruments roughly 25 years ago. No Japanese language proficiency is listed (English fluent, German basic), which is a hard requirement (native-level Japanese). Resume timeline also contains inconsistencies (overlapping roles, dates predating plausible career start) that further reduce confidence.
strengths: Long, broad software engineering career across multiple stacks and domains
Some historical exposure to C/C++ at National Instruments and audio/embedded hobby work
Open-source contributions, public speaking, and workshop/teaching experience
concerns: No native-level Japanese proficiency — hard requirement not met
No embedded networking, LAN-switch, or network security (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP) experience
No recent C or Linux kernel source modification experience; current work is web/TypeScript-focused

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking / security domain experience
Lack of recent C and Linux kernel work
